1g of caffeine was a mistake but pizza was the right call for the night before

caffeine_note.S: 800mg in Sep 2025 caused significant panic attack post-comp. Reduced to ~450mg with L-theanine throughout. Reassess 2wk out.

creatine.S: Do NOT reload creatine before weigh-in — it pulls water into muscle cells, fighting the cut. Reload IMMEDIATELY after weigh-in.

morning.S: Sip water casually. No heavy restriction if naturally near 163lb after creatine drop.

night_before.S: Small 3-cheese pizza + 1 glass wine. No beer (carbonation). No Sprite.

post_weigh_in.S: Water + electrolytes immediately. Small snack (banana, juice). Save real meal for after last attempt.

notes.S:
WRPF rules. 75kg class. Same-day weigh-in 2hr before. Night before: small 3-cheese pizza + 1 glass of wine (no beer/Sprite — carbonation affects brace under load). Morning of: sip water casually if naturally near weight (no dramatic restriction needed if creatine drop worked). Post weigh-in: immediate water + electrolytes, then eat normally — only ~90min to digest before platform. Comp day fuel: energy gels between attempts for blood glucose. Caffeine: REVISED DOWN from 800mg (caused panic attack Sep 2025). Target 400-500mg total with L-theanine paired throughout. W14 deads: CONFIRMED SKIP. This comp is also a CPU rehearsal — conservative attempt selection, platform practice.

STATUS CHANGE (Mar 30): Moved to optional. Toronto logistics (5am wake, traffic) make this unappealing. If Sunny Daze or APEX happen, this is likely dropped.

DROPPED (Apr 1): Replaced by Sunny Daze + APEX dual comp plan. No cut, 83kg walk-in.

diet.S: 3.5-4k cal surplus starting immediately after WRPF weigh-in. 20g creatine/day split 4x5g. 4L water/day. Full reload ASAP for CNS and strength recovery.

inflammation.S: Keep break controlled enough that weight doesn't balloon uncontrollably

rest.S: 1 full week no training post-May comp

notes.S:
CPU/IPF rules. 83kg class. Sunny Daze by Catalano Events at Peter Clark Hall, University of Guelph. June 13-14. Registration deadline May 13. Entry $185. AM weigh-in 7:00am, PM weigh-in 12:30pm.

REPOSITIONED (Mar 30): Now an IN-BETWEEN comp, not the peak. Targets are proportional — ~60% of progress from current training maxes to APEX goals. Real peak targets (S200/B130/D250) moved to APEX Aug 22. If this comp happens, lifter would be mid-build, not peaked. Treat as platform practice and IPF farewell while Rigor Mortis sleeves are still legal. If skipped, swap the preceding 4 weeks to a hypertrophy block for APEX prep.

Hotel required in Guelph. Decide by Apr 30.

CONFIRMED (Apr 1): Primary qualifier for CPU Regionals. Need 535+ total. Conservative S195/B122.5/D240=557.5. Walk in at ~79kg in 83kg class. No cut. Water retention stack active.

location.S: Apex Barbell Club, 5109 Harvester Rd Unit 11B, Burlington, ON

notes.S:
WRPF rules. 82.5kg class. No cut — walk in at natural weight (~80-82kg). Aug 22-23, 2026. Apex Barbell Club, Burlington.

ADDED (Mar 30): This is the REAL peak comp. Full targets moved here from the old CPU Guelph entry. Programming plan: current block runs through ~W9 (mid-April) as strength data collection. Deload 1 week. If Sunny Daze is skipped, 4-6 week hypertrophy block at 3.5-4k cal surplus (May-June) to add muscle mass under squat and bench. Then 8-9 week peak: deload to 80% of projected max and single up proportionally to target. If Sunny Daze happens, hypertrophy block is shorter (~4 weeks post-Sunny Daze recovery) then peak.

Registration: confirm with Apex Barbell directly (plm@apexbarbellclub.ca). Regular local WRPF meet — likely no qualifying DOTS for open registration. Ottawa Open total (520kg) should suffice if any minimum applies.

APEX PEAK STRUCTURE (to be built after Apr 30 decision):
- Deload to 80% of projected max
- Single up proportionally each week to target
- S200/B130/D250 as peak singles in final heavy week
- Taper 1-2 weeks before comp

CONFIRMED (Apr 1): Peak comp. Full send. 20-week build from Apr 4. Water retention stack through W24, desaturation W24-W27. Creatine drops ~Jul 25 (28 days to clear). Glycerol drops 2 days before. Walk in at natural weight ~80-82kg.

Current: 168lb (~76.2kg). Target: 74kg class (≤163.1lb at weigh-in). Delta: ~5lb to drop. Must confirm on track by W7 (Mar 29 — 4 weeks from comp). Strategy: gradual diet deficit now, salt+carb manipulation in peak week. If cut looks unrealistic before May comp → move to June in 83kg class instead and go all-out.

UPDATED WEIGHT CUT STRATEGY (Mar 15): Observed 168.8lb post-bath (sweated ~3lb in bath), after 1L mango juice (2.2lb), full creatine saturation 10g/day 3wks (3-5lb), active training inflammation (1-2lb). True resting baseline estimated 164-165lb. W8: drop creatine. W8+: switch hot baths to contrast showers (cold finish). W12 convention: mild calorie reduction OK. 1 drink max. No late nights before W13. W13 cut salt, increase water flush. W14: bare minimum water, protein focus, NO deads. Night before WRPF: small 3-cheese pizza + 1 glass wine. NOT beer (carbonation). NOT Sprite (carbonation). Morning of: sip water casually if at weight naturally — no sauna needed if baseline cooperates. Post weigh-in: water + electrolytes first, then creatine reload, then food. If still ≥165lb by Apr 30 → register CPU at 83kg, no cut needed, go all-out. Target: confirm 74kg for both comps by Apr 30 deadline.

CUT ABANDONED. 74kg class dropped for both comps. Sunny Daze at 83kg, APEX at 82.5kg. Walk in at natural weight (~79-80kg). Water retention stack means bodyweight will trend UP slightly (creatine + glycerol = +3-5lb intramuscular water). Eat at or slightly above maintenance — this training volume demands fuel. No caloric deficit. Weight target: stay under 82.5kg naturally, which should be trivial at current 76.1kg + water stack. Desaturation from W24 strips ~2-3kg water weight before APEX.

L.S: 2026-03-22: Major program update. WRPF moved to May 30, 75kg class. Squat progression 175→185→190→195. DL heavy every other week (odd only from W8+). Bench 1 backout from W7. Shrugs dropped for seated cable row + reverse cable flies. Chest supported row replaces Pendlay. W11+ accessory cutoff. W14+ no accessories. DL backouts changed to 85%×1 + 75%×1 before heavy. No straps from W7. Weighted pullups +10lb/wk from 35lb (W6).

2026-03-30: Sat Mar 28 missed (keycard). Sun Mar 29 partial — bench 245lb/112kg failed (J-hook collision rep 2). Hamstring curls moved from Thursday to DL day (2 sets). COMP RESTRUCTURE: Strength Lives Here → optional. Sunny Daze (CPU, Jun 13-14 Guelph) → optional in-between comp with proportional targets (S190/B120/D235=545). APEX TOP 4 (WRPF, Aug 22-23 Burlington) added as optional primary peak comp (S200/B130/D250=580 at 82.5kg). Real targets moved to APEX. Decision on all comps by Apr 30. Current training sessions unchanged pending decision.

2026-04-01: MAJOR RESTRUCTURE. 74kg cut abandoned. Dual-comp plan: Sunny Daze (CPU Jun 13, 83kg) + APEX (WRPF Aug 22, 82.5kg). SLH dropped. New 4-day split (Sat/Sun/Tue/Thu). Water retention stack added (creatine + glycerol + betaine + taurine + glucosamine). Squat 2x/week (heavy Sat + volume Thu at 80%-5kg). Bench 3x/week (1/3/6 scheme +2kg/week to 130). DL weekly to 220 then biweekly +10 to 250. Hex bar RDL removed. Spoto removed. Leg press replaces squat from W24. Desaturation starts W24 for APEX.

notes.S: half scoop — top up post cut
skipped — last event, already fully ramped

carbs.S: energy gels between attempts for blood glucose

notes.S: Do NOT use as a template for future comps without reassessment. 800mg under competition stress is high. State in 3 months unknown — revisit dose closer to May comp.

outcome.S: performed well — total 522.5kg. Experienced significant panic attack post-comp, likely combination of caffeine load, adrenaline crash, and competition stress. Doable but not comfortable.

L.S: PROGRAM RESTRUCTURED Apr 1. Dual-comp plan: Sunny Daze (CPU, Jun 13) + APEX (WRPF, Aug 22). 74kg cut ABANDONED. Walk in at natural weight (~79kg) in 83kg/82.5kg class.
Water retention stack: creatine 10g/day + glycerol (GlycerPump) 1g/kg pre-session + betaine 2.5g/day + taurine 3g pre-session + glucosamine/chondroitin for joints.
Desaturation protocol: creatine drops W24 (~Jul 25, 28 days before APEX). Glycerol drops 2 days before. Betaine/taurine clear fast. Strip water, retain neural/structural strength.

4-day split: Sat (squat heavy + bench heavy + leg press + pullups), Sun (DL or posterior chain + leg press), Tue (pause bench + chest supported row + GHR), Thu (squat volume + bench volume + bi curls + cable rows).
Squat: Saturday heavy (150x5 → singles to 215), Thursday volume (80% of heavy - 5kg, x6). Post W23: leg press replaces squat. W27 sharpener at 200x1.
Deadlift: weekly singles to 220 (W8-W12), then biweekly +10kg (230/240/245/250). Backout structure: 75%x1 + 85%x1 BEFORE heavy. No straps. Leg press after every DL.
Bench: 3 sessions/week. Day 1 single (+2kg/week to 130), Day 2 pause triples (~85% heavy), Day 3 sixes (~72% heavy). All days: 95% and 85% backoffs at same reps.
No hamstring work past Tuesday. GHR on Tuesdays (25lb x3 sets). Dumbbell RDLs on non-DL Sundays. Leg curls 2x6 max on Sundays only.
Pullups: Saturday, 5 reps, +2.5kg/week from 12kg. Progressive overload.
Leg press: heavy on both Sat and Sun. Double quad stimulus.
Thursday accessories: bicep curls + cable rows ONLY. No chest/shoulders — let them recover for Saturday.
Squat peaks at 215 (W23), then leg press through W26. Single sharpener at 200 in W27 taper. 5 weeks of leg press maintains quad strength without CNS drain.
DL peaks at 250 (W24). Maintenance singles at 240 biweekly through taper.
Sunny Daze attempt selection: S170/185/195, B110/117.5/122.5, D200/225/240. Total 557.5. CPU regional qualifier = 535.
GLYCEROL NOTE: Glycerol ≠ glycine. Need actual glycerol powder (GlycerPump/HydroMax). ~1g/kg with 500ml water 60-90min pre-session. Start at 0.5g/kg, titrate up. GI issues possible.
If squat volume at 80%-5 becomes unsustainable, drop to 5 reps before dropping weight.

intent.S: APEX taper
APEX comp

session_notes.S: WRPF comp. 82.5kg class. Peak comp. Target total 597.5.

notes.S: 3-5mg/kg. Hard cap 450mg comp day. Pair with 250mg L-theanine. Panic attack at 800mg Sep 2025.
Reduced from 2500mg. Studies used 600-675mg KSM-66. Higher doses not better-studied, increase liver risk.
Powder form. NO elevation for blood flow. No water retention.
Intracellular pH buffer. Takes 4+ weeks to saturate carnosine. Loading now.
Switched from 200mg zinc citrate (Phase 1). Citrate has poor absorption so 200mg was defensible but unnecessary risk long-term. Sulfate/gluconate at 20mg is better absorbed and well within UL.
200-300mg/kg at 75kg = 15-22.5g. Gelatin capsules. 60-90min pre-session. Start at 15g, titrate up by ~4g per session.
Reduced from 600mg. Sleep and recovery support.

A robust body of evidence indicates that creatine enhances lower body and upper body strength performance during exercise that is less than 3 minutes long, including maximal weight lifted in the squat, leg press, and bench press in addition to the number of bench press repetitions.
improvement was not significantly different from placebo. will drop

Full general wellness + performance + hormonal stack.
mostly using leftovers
KEEP RUNNING — no longer dropping for cut. Intramuscular water retention is the goal. Drops W24 (~Jul 25) for APEX desaturation.
Hyperhydration agent. Start at 20g then increase to 30g. Take 60-90min pre-session. GI warning: can cause bloating/nausea at full dose. NOT glycine — completely different compound.
Osmolyte. Modest intramuscular water retention. Cholewa et al. showed squat and bench improvements. Take with meals.
Osmolyte. Anti-cramping. Supports electrolyte balance during heavy training. Moved earlier from Phase 3.
Blood flow support. No water retention issues.
Carnosine saturation continues. Full ergogenic benefit by now.
Cortisol management during heavy training block.

WATER RETENTION MAXIMIZATION. Goal: maximize intramuscular water for better leverages, tighter belt fit, joint health. Creatine + glycerol are the primary drivers. Betaine and taurine are secondary osmolytes. Glucosamine for joint insurance during high-frequency squatting. All supplements continue until W24 desaturation.

phase_name.S: Water Retention + Performance Stack (W8, Apr 4 → W23, Jul 23)

notes.S: Drop W24 (~Jul 25). 28 days to fully clear intracellular water. APEX Aug 22 = 28 days.
No water retention. Anti-cramping benefit during dehydration period.

DESATURATION PHASE. Strip intramuscular water while retaining neural/structural strength adaptations. Creatine takes 28 days to clear — timed for APEX Aug 22. Glycerol clears in 48hrs. If bodyweight naturally at ~80-82kg after desaturation, no water cut needed for 82.5kg class.
HARD CAP 450mg. Split: 100mg pre-venue, 100mg post-weigh-in, 100-150mg between squat/bench, 100mg between bench/DL. Pair each with 250mg L-theanine. Sep 2025 panic attack at 800mg.
Smooths jitteriness. Critical given caffeine sensitivity history.
~10g night before with dinner, ~12g morning of 90min pre-squats. 9 maximal attempts — buffering compounds by attempt 2+3.
Reload immediately post-weigh-in with carbs and water. Never before weigh-in.
APEX comp day stack. Caffeine hard cap 450mg with L-theanine throughout. Creatine reload AFTER weigh-in only. Sodium bicarb serial loaded night before + morning of.
